recipes.name: agent-roadmap-slides
recipes.focus: Present the adoption sequence, milestones, and operating constraints for an engineering leadership review.

recipes.name: agent-roadmap-audio
recipes.focus: Discuss the tradeoffs between platform guardrails, team enablement, and rollout speed.

recipes.name: agent-roadmap-report
recipes.prompt: Write an engineering roadmap report with sections for context, platform guardrails, enablement plan, rollout milestones, risks, and concrete next actions.
